message:
fix(http): restore multi-worker pool to prevent single-worker starvation, harden connection limits, retune TUI diff

Revert single-worker default that allowed partial/incomplete client
sockets to monopolize the runtime and starve MCP traffic. Scale HTTP
workers to available_parallelism clamped [4, 32] with env-var override
AM_HTTP_WORKER_THREADS clamped [4, 64].

Harden HTTP listener: bound keep-alive reuse to 8 requests per
connection, reduce idle timeout from 10s to 1s, tighten header size
limit from 64KB to 32KB and body limit from 16MB to 1MB, tighten
supervisor probe interval from 10s to 2s.

Restore explicit TUI diff strategy tuning (c_emit=8.0,
min_observation_cells=8, hysteresis_ratio=0.08,
uncertainty_guard_variance=0.0015) with dirty-span guard band and
tile-diff thresholds to prevent incremental/redraw strategy thrashing
at overlay/modal boundaries.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
